omitted_declarations.policy_reference: Web beacons are used to track online movements of web users or to access cookies. They help us understand how users interact with our Platform by transmitting information back to us or our partners.
Web beacons are used to track online movements of web users or to access cookies. They help us understand how users interact with our Platform by transmitting information back to us or our partners.

Business Transfers: In the event of a merger, acquisition, sale, or transfer of assets, your personal data may be shared or transferred to the acquiring entity or third parties involved in the transaction. If such a change occurs, we will notify you of the new ownership and any changes to the way your data is handled, as described in this Privacy Policy.
